hotel_name: Khách sạn K&T Sân bay TSN-150m từ Nhà ga T3 (K&T Hotel Sân Bay TSN-150m Từ Nhà Ga T3)

reviews.title: Dishonest management and poor room substitution
reviews.text: I had a very disappointing experience here. Upon arrival, I was told there was a 'system error' and was forced to move to a sister property. Not only was the new hotel much further away, but the room quality was significantly worse. The most shocking part? When I arrived at the second hotel, I saw their computer screen clearly showing my Agoda booking as active and normal—proving the 'system error' was a lie. Since it was late at night, I had no choice but to stay, but I felt cheated. Avoid this place if you value honesty and getting what you paid for.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Bad room

reviews.title: Not clean
reviews.text:
As you can see in the pictures we had 1 room which got changed because we had a cockroach and stains on the bed. The second room was little bit better but had ants in the bed and something like bird poop on the frame of the bed. 

For a layover I would say try to chose a different accommodation since this one isn’t really cheap considering the prices in Vietnam.

reviews.title: Staffs were rude. They were swearing and talking dirty about guests behind their back and laughing . I understand Vietna
reviews.positives: Close to the airport
reviews.negatives: Didn’t include breakfast

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Air condition is really bad

reviews.title: Not as good as expected!
reviews.positives: Close to the airport
reviews.negatives: Pillows cases, bedding sheets and comforter doesn’t seem clean. There was lots of dirt on the bedding sheets when I tried to used it that night. It was late so I took it off    and laying down on the comforter.

reviews.title: Except for the cheap ones, they don't provide soundproofing either.
reviews.text: I chose this place because it was close to the airport and affordable. The room size was manageable for just one night, but the soundproofing is terrible; I could hear everything from the next room. I was woken up by noise early in the morning. The air conditioning is also weak, so I think I'll choose a different place next time.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Staff and location close to the airport.
reviews.negatives: No coffee or coffee cups in the rooms.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The facilities are basic and the room is clean, but it is definitely not 150 meters from Terminal 3 — it’s at least 1.5 to 2 kilometers away. That claim is absolutely misleading. It’s also very difficult to get a taxi early in the morning.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Location and the price.Staff s very helpful.
reviews.negatives: Bed s a bit hard to sleep.

reviews.title: Rude staff
reviews.text:
The staffs were swearing and laughing behind my back because I changed from Agoda which $15 cheaper than Booking 
I booked 3 nights and paid ahead but I came late 1 days and don’t have that room because they said the air was broken. I talked to them and they swapped me to a different room than the one I booked which have windows view. Price is ok for sleeping- $**.** after discount for 3 nights with no cleaning no water refill unless you ask for- while waiting for the flight but I don’t recommend and never come back this hotel

reviews.title: Would recommend for those who want to stay close to Airport with reasonable price
reviews.positives: Room is clean and bigger than I thought
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Book the room only with window. Without window totally no air in the room. 
Even for one night is not good.
Location is close to airport. We walked 10 min.

reviews.title: Great time staying at K & T hotel
reviews.positives: Clean and good location
reviews.negatives: Nothing much

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Phòng quá hôi mùi thuốc lá.Nhân viên lễ tân chưa được sự đồng ý của khách hàng đã tiết lộ thông tin khách hàng.Phòng sạch sẽ

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: New place, good location

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Can’t sleep well in the morning

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Such a brand new hotel. Friendly staff!

reviews.title: Bad for Suite
reviews.text:
I booked a suite expecting a quiet and comfortable stay. Unfortunately, I was given a room on the 7th floor and the noise outside during the night was extremely loud. It was very difficult to sleep because of the constant disturbance. I’m not sure what was happening outside overnight, but the noise level was disappointing, especially for a suite room.

Another issue was the room door. It is made of glass instead of wood, which provides very little privacy. For a suite, I believe a solid wood door would be much more appropriate and comfortable for guests.

reviews.title: Cauchemar a fuir
reviews.positives: Rien du tout
reviews.negatives: Tout

reviews.title: Đánh giá khách quan
reviews.text: Tất cả đều ok ngoại trừ giường rất cứng và ngủ rất đau lưng .

reviews.title: Pour une nuit de passage
reviews.positives: Les chambres sont correctes et l’établissement proche de l’aéroport. C’est d’ailleurs sont seul intérêt.
reviews.negatives: Pas de petit déjeuner et des matelas très  durs

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.text: Hotel is fairly new and clean. The bath tub is very high that makes it hard to get in and out when there's nothing to hold on to.

reviews.title: hotel pour être proche de l aéroport  en cas de départ matinal ou tardif
reviews.positives: Hotel loin du centre mais idéal pour départ matinal car proche de l"aéroport . Pas de petit déjeuner, odeurs désagréable dans la chambre et comme souvent ménage pas fait la veille de de notre départ
reviews.negatives: Odeurs de poisson dans la chambre, pas de menage le dernier jour, accueil correct sans plus

reviews.title: Great for a layover
reviews.text: I’ll start with the not so good. In Agoda this hotel has literally as a part of its name the fact that it’s 150m from Terminal 3. This is totally untrue, the real distance is 1.4km walking and about 3km from the International terminal, which is quite good for going there with Grab - but still claiming that it’s 150m from the terminal is not right. The rest is all good - nice modern building, with elevator (when you are with a suitcase that really matters), clean, quiet… perfect for a rest and refreshing between flights.

reviews.title: Super, sauf lit très dur .
reviews.positives: Près de l’aéroport
reviews.negatives: Lit extra dur.

reviews.title: Quite Clean because it is quite new
reviews.text: Rooms are quite clean, has ventilation and windows if facing the streets. price is very affordable if you are looking for a quick and low cost accomdation near TERMINAL 3 TSN airport which is a 20 minutes walk on the uneven path. if you have lugguage, take a GRAB taxi for less than $2 USD. No much amenities nearby, few eateries. Staff are helpful and friendly if you know what to do.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.negatives: Il n'y a pas de clim dans les couloirs et ascenseur

reviews.title: Everything’s fine for the price
reviews.text:
It’s cheap. Room is somewhat clean (The towel has some stained on it, as well as the bed, the others’s fine) with available standard facilities. Facilities are in good condition.

Staff is friendly.

I have room with city view, tv with netflix, free water bottles. 

I had a good time here

reviews.title: Pratique et personnel professionnel
reviews.positives:
Nikel pour aller al aéroport ou pour son premier jour pour se poser. 
De plus, le personnel est très arrangeant. Je voulais faire un me photocopie urgente et ils ont accepté

reviews.title: Temporary accommodation before airport departure
reviews.text: A place I rested at briefly due to a late night departure from the airport. The accommodation near the airport is good for the price, but there was one flaw: there was only one small used roll of toilet paper in the bathroom, and when I requested more, they said they would take care of it but didn't provide any until check-out.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Die Lage ist super,schnell am Flughafen
reviews.negatives: Matratze det Horror,hard wie Stein,klimaanlage direkt über det Türe,,bläßt direkt zum Bett,Foeber vorprogramiert

reviews.title: will comeback
reviews.text: Excellent stay

reviews.title: Für eine kurze Absteige ist das Hotel für den Preis auf jeden Fall empfehlenswert.
reviews.positives: Wir hatten ein Hotel in der Nähe vom Terminal gesucht, da wir sehr spät von Phu Quoc gekommen und am nächsten Morgen nach Doha geflogen sind.
reviews.negatives: Mehr als eine Nacht würden wir dort nicht bleiben. Liegt abseits vom Stadtzentrum. Kein Wohlgefühl-Hotel.

reviews.title: Value for money
reviews.text: In reality, the hotel is not 150m from T3 :) it is not walkable, however, the roads are spacious, and considering the price, the hotel is surprisingly good.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sehr simpel und man hat alles was man braucht.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is convenient for those traveling to the airport. The rooms are small and the walls are not soundproof; I can hear every noise from the next room, conversations... very clearly and it is inconvenient.

reviews.title: Sauber und flughafennah
reviews.positives: 4. Februar 2026, das Hotel ist noch nicht lange geöffnet, z. T. noch Schutzfolie auf den Schaltern, daher noch alles wie neu und sauber. Terminal 3 fußläufig (1km) leicht erreichbar, in der Gegend mehrere Supermärkte in Restaurants, Zimmer ausreichend groß und eine Dachterrasse für einen Blick auf den Flughafen und die Stadt in der 8. Etage, supergut für eine Nacht vor den Flug.
reviews.negatives: Bett bretthart und wer lärmempfindlich ist, die startenden Flugzeuge hört man.

reviews.title: good stay
reviews.text: Good stay and coming back

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Comodo per l’aeroporto (terminal 3 a 15 min a piedi)
reviews.negatives: La stanza aveva una finestra che dava sulla reception, il personale non parlava molto inglese

reviews.title: Good!
reviews.text: The hotel near the domestic terminal of Vietnam Airlines at Tan Son Nhat Airport is very convenient for getting to the airport, the rooms are spacious and clean. I managed to get a significantly discounted room rate, so the price is very reasonable compared to the quality of the room. There are many dining options around the hotel.

reviews.title: Prima basic hotel.
reviews.positives: We hadden een nachtvlucht en verbleven hier om ons op te frissen en klaar te maken voor vertrek. We hebben er dus niet overnacht. Het hotel is vrij basic, maar dat hadden we ook verwacht.
reviews.negatives: In hetzelfde district bevinden zich twee hotels met de naam K&T. We waren bijna naar het verkeerde hotel genavigeerd.

reviews.title: I really like this place and location is so good!
reviews.text: The road after complete no more trash and dirty road is a plus for this hotel! The only thing I don't like sleep on super hard mattress. This area seems to provide services for local and they used to hard bed! For me is a big struggle to sleep on such tough bed 😫

reviews.title: お得です。
reviews.positives:
お部屋全体に綺麗だった。

アメニティも使わなかったが、
シャンプー（リンスなし）、ボディーソープ、石鹸、歯ブラシなどきちんとあった。ドライヤーもありました。

テレビは、YouTube見れるタイプ。
ペットボトルのお水も1人1本ありました。
冷蔵庫もあり。

シャワーのお湯もキチンと出て、水圧もOK。
reviews.negatives:
壁が薄い？
他音が聞こえる。廊下の音、飛行機の音。

たまたま泊まった部屋のドアが曇りガラスで、
夜でも廊下の灯りが入ります。

シャワーとトイレの境目に壁がないので、
トイレまで水が飛びます。
床は綺麗で、部屋にはゴム草履がありました。


でも、価格は安くて、お部屋自体は綺麗なので、
合格点です。
トランジットに寝るだけなので。

reviews.title: Near the airport
reviews.text: Convenient because it's near the airport, and there are plenty of restaurants, convenience stores, pharmacies around, the streets are spacious, making it easy to catch a taxi or book a Grab ride. At this price, it's really good.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 房間新乾淨，附近有吃的，步行能到
reviews.negatives: 小房間窗戶做死的，白天如果睡覺稍亮

reviews.title: Helpful Staff
reviews.text: Exceptional value and friendly staff.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: 房間很新，熱水足夠，附近有吃的，整體來說不錯
reviews.negatives: 房間小窗戶做死的不能開，沒窗簾，白天睡覺稍微亮

reviews.title: great location
reviews.text: very clean and big rooms. great location about 1km walk to terminal 3 Tan Son Nhat international airport

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: 작지만 깔끔하고 쾌적했고 티비는 크고 유투브와 넷플과 연동이 잘되고 에어컨도 잘 나오고 샤워시설 또한 좋았어요
reviews.negatives: 방음 / 침대모서리 지날때마다 상처생김

reviews.title: A short break before going to airport
reviews.text: Very budget hotel for a short rest before flight. Basic facilities. Bed make squeaky noise when there is a slight movement.

reviews.title: 很棒！
reviews.positives: 距离机场非常近，位置优越；酒店门口每天早上有咖啡早餐摊，大概一直到上午11点左右，座位正好是阴凉处，一边喝咖啡一边看着车来车往挺有意思的。员工非常热情，虽然房间设施出了一点点小问题，但是他们非常迅速地解决了，效率非常高！谢谢
reviews.negatives: 连续住宿需要打扫房间的话，需要告诉前台。（并不是什么大问题，只是入住的时候不知道）

reviews.title: 2 minutes from Ho Chi Minh Airport
reviews.text: I had a long layover and needed some sleep. I booked a hotel here for a very low price. It was a small room, but very clean and suitable for me to rest for several hours. It had a nice bathroom, refrigerator and large screen TV. My only issue was the desk clerk didn't speak English and my wifi wasn't working so it was hard to communicate, but I checked in without a problem when I showed him my reservation. I would recommend if  you need quick access to the airport.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Ngăn kéo tủ cạnh giường còn 1c hộp đựng rác nhạy cảm của khách ở trước đấy. Thực sự rất kinh khi tìm thấy n. Cần chú ý vệ sinh nhiều

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Everything is wonderful in terms of location and price. However, it would be great if the hotel managed the cleaning staff more effectively. When I arrived, the mattress wasn't clean, and the previous guest's razor was still left behind. The room cleaning the next day was very superficial.

reviews.title: Làm khách hiểu lầm KS cách sân bay 150m, nhưng thực tế ko phải vậy. Cách sân bay khoảng 3-4km
reviews.negatives: Đặt phòng giường đôi, nhưng khi nhận phòng KS báo hết phòng giường đôi và xếp cho phòng có 2 giường đơn.

reviews.title: Nice clean new hotel near airport
reviews.text: Nice clean simple hotel near airport. The internet is not great 20 down 12 up. But other than that good price, clean room.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Toilet mùi kinh khủng phòng tầng trệt !

reviews.title: Short time usage review
reviews.text: This is the accommodation I briefly stopped at to go to the airport at midnight. The lodging was satisfactory for the price. The room was spacious, and the staff were friendly. However, I experienced discomfort due to poor drainage in the shower.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Chỗ ở gần sbay...hly
reviews.negatives: Nvien hơi lạnh nhạt

reviews.title: Convenient location but…
reviews.text:
This hotel was a good value for the price but the bed is so hard, I know Vietnamese beds are hard but I think the floor was softer!
If it’s to have rest before a flight you may want another choice. The constrain the building is also very noisy late into the night and early again in the morning. It is impossible to have an afternoon nap if you have a late flight!

reviews.title: Tạm. Không tốt
reviews.positives: Chưa tìm ra dc chỗ ưng ý
reviews.negatives: Mình nghĩ chỗ nghỉ cần trang bị nhiều hơn (máy sấy tóc cơ bản,..) Ga giường cần sạch hơn vì có côn trùng và tóc ngắn vẫn có trên giường và vết ố. Ks nên thuê dịch vụ chuyên làm sạch để họ có kinh nghiệm và thao tác tốt hơn, đồng thời cũng cần cách âm vì phòng nào phòng nấy ra vô đều nghe rõ (rất ồn)

reviews.title: Good for short stay transit
reviews.text: It's near to the airport. Basic for a short stay

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới, trang thiết bị mới. Gần nhà ga T3, có thể đi bộ khoảng 700m, nhưng đường đi ko đẹp lắm, không có vỉa hè, nhiều sỏi đá trên đường. Nên cân nhắc nếu kéo vali
reviews.negatives: Tường ngăn cách chỉ là tấm alu, ko cách âm, nghe rõ tiếng ngáy, tiếng điện thoại phòng bên. Thang máy hơi nhỏ. Phía trước cửa có công trường hoạt động cả đêm, ko thể ngủ được

reviews.title: ROOM OK BUT SOUNDPROOFING NOT GOOD
reviews.text: The room is new and beautiful; however, the sound insulation is not really good. You can clearly hear footsteps from outside, especially in the room near the elevator. Suggestions to make the hotel better.

reviews.title: Kì nghỉ của tôi hoàn toàn bt nhưng trải nghiệm ở khách sạn này tôi nghĩ là 1 trải nghiệm k tốt với tôi.
reviews.positives: Gần nhà ga T3 nhưng không phải cách 150m. Thực tế đi bộ cách khoảng 1,7km nhưng nếu search google sẽ ra cách 4,2km. Bắt taxi sẽ hết hơn 100k, có nhóm trước miình taxi hết 175k. Cảm giác như bị lừa
reviews.negatives: Khách sạn mới nhưng vệ sinh chưa kĩ . Sàn nhà còn dấu vết xi măng, hình như ks k thuê đội vệ sinh công nghiệp để làm sạch phòng sau khi xây xong . Điều hòa casper hàng lởm của Trung Quốc, cực kì nóng. Phòng k có thêm quạt. Thử tưởng tượng, bạn vừa xuống sân bay , với thời tiết của Sài Gòn, phòng k quạt, điều hòa mát siêu chậm, thật phát điên

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is still new, clean, and close to everything. There is an extremely delicious and clean vegetarian restaurant next door.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives: Phòng có mùi thuốc lá

reviews.title: Very clean, simple but good enough for short layover
reviews.text: I enjoyed 12hr layover in this hotel

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Phòng rộng
reviews.negatives: Nước không nóng, giường cứng không có đàn hồi

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The place is suitable for the price. Clean and comfortable.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Gần sân bay
reviews.negatives: Thiếu nước uống;

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is new and looks clean, but the floor is still a bit sticky, making it uncomfortable to walk on. I've stayed for 2 nights, and I haven't seen anyone come to clean the room. Because the hotel is said to be newly built, there might still be some oversights, so I still rate it 5 stars.

reviews.title: Tốt khi ở một mình
reviews.positives: Vị trí tốt
reviews.negatives: Tóc rất nhiều trong phòng và phòng tắm bằng kính nên rất bất tiện sinh hoạt cho 2 khách (đèn sáng khi sử dụng phòng vệ sinh cho khách còn lại khi ngủ)

reviews.title: New
reviews.text: It's still a bit dusty, but the staff is enthusiastic and friendly.

reviews.title: Ổn
reviews.positives: Gần sân bay, mặt phố lớn nên thuận tiện đi lại
reviews.negatives: Vẫn còn bị muỗi

reviews.title: A great place to stay within the price range.
reviews.text: Reasonably priced for this guest class. Located on a main road. Very close to the airport (within walking distance if you don't have too much luggage). Very easy to find. The hotel seems to have been recently built, feels very new. The room I stayed in, 701 - You can sit and count planes flying by the window :D. The room has air conditioning but no fan, so it was quite uncomfortable when I first entered (hot). When the air conditioning is cool, it can easily get cold. Overall, I would rate it 9.9 out of 10.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Ok
reviews.negatives: Ko co

reviews.title: Only one night
reviews.text: It’s good everything, we were just waiting for a flight over night and Perfectly fulfilled our needs although the beds are very very hard

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Khách sạn mới xây, thiết bị đều còn mới. Nhân viên thân thiện.
Vị trí gần T3 Tân Sơn Nhất, xung quanh nhiều hàng quán dịch vụ.

reviews.title: Room near the airport, clean.
reviews.text: Close to the airport, the room is clean and fully equipped. However, the room does not have dim lights, so when the lights are off, it gets too dark.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Khách sạn yên tĩnh
reviews.negatives: Mấy ngày lưu trú, khó khăn trong việc tìm chỗ đậu xe. Một phần do ảnh hưởng công trình sửa chữa đường phía trước KS.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Perfect

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Gần sân bay, tiện, gần đó có các quán ăn sáng ổn. Giá hợp lý, sạch sẽ, đủ tiện nghi. Có xuất hóa đơn.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Okie ks mới ở okie

reviews.title: Tạm ổn
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới

reviews.title: The hotel is very great.
reviews.text: Affordable but the new mattress is clean and fresh. The room is bright. Amenities are just enough. It is well cleaned. Also very close to the airport.

reviews.title: Hài lòng
reviews.positives: Ks mới, tiện nghi, phòng rộng
reviews.negatives: Thiếu dép đi trong phòng

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Friendly staff, affordable room but fully equipped, clean, spacious, conveniently located for those needing to go to the airport. I will book again next time.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Nhân viên dễ thươngggg
reviews.negatives: Phòng tắm cửa kính nên hơi bất tiện vs điều hoà hơi ồn

reviews.title: Good stay near airport
reviews.text: Everything about our stay in this hotel was great, except the bed was so hard. But we still have a good rest before morning flight 👍🏻

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives:
Mình đã có trải nghiệm khá dễ chịu tại khách sạn. Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện và hỗ trợ nhanh. Vị trí cũng thuận tiện để di chuyển, tạo cảm giác yên tâm khi lưu trú.
Mọi thứ đều tốt hơn mong đợi, mình thật sự đánh giá cao sự chu đáo của khách sạn về giá cả cũng như chất lượng phục vụ.
reviews.negatives:
Tuy nhiên, mình có một góp ý nhỏ để trải nghiệm tốt hơn trong tương lai:
👉 Khách sạn có thể mở cửa phòng cho thoáng trước khi khách đến nhận. Điều này giúp không khí tươi hơn, giảm mùi ẩm và tạo cảm giác đón tiếp dễ chịu ngay khi bước vào.
Chỉ là một chi tiết nhỏ, nhưng sẽ nâng chất lượng dịch vụ lên nhiều.

Nhìn chung, mình hài lòng và sẵn sàng quay lại trong những lần tiếp theo.

reviews.title: A clean hotel within a 10-minute walk from the airport.
reviews.text:
If you walk for just 10 minutes without worrying about catching a taxi, you will reach Terminal 3 of Ho Chi Minh Airport.

The rooms are not large, but they maintain a very good level of cleanliness, and the staff is friendly as well.

If I were to recommend one of the hotels around Ho Chi Minh Airport, I would recommend this one.

reviews.title: Wonderful
reviews.text: I had a flight to Switzerland on the night of October 4th, the hotel helped with early check-in. When I arrived, there was a security guard named Sa who was very kind and cheerful. In the evening, while passing by the airport, I asked my mom to send him a cup of coffee, but he had changed shifts. Thank you so much, Sa (the name was provided by the receptionist to my mom). When my mom checked out early on October 5th, he hadn't come to work yet. Please send my thanks to him for his warmth and kindness. I will definitely return to the hotel to thank him. The hotel is new, the elevator is beautiful and clean, and the rooms are newly furnished. I will come back.

reviews.title: Very near to airport, very good price
reviews.text:
Within walking distance (15 minutes) to Terminal 3, TSN Airport, even with a suitcase, it's easy to reach. The taxi has to take a longer detour and cost 217k there and 50k back with a Xanh taxi. Mini Market and Restaurants nearby.
The K@T Hotel is quietly located, very clean, relatively newly furnished, with a hot shower and plenty of towels. The bed is rather hard but not uncomfortable, and the air conditioning and refrigerator actually work. All in all, it's very reasonably priced. The staff is friendly and helpful, but unfortunately, they don't speak English. I liked the new smart TV best.
We'll definitely be back.

reviews.text:
3박4일 머무르는동안 청소를 해주지않았습니다..수건도 매일 달라고 말을했고...아침 6시부터 호텔복도에는 떠드는소리에 시끄럽고...옷을 다벗고있는대 방문을 노크도하지않은채 마스터키로 문을열어버리고...
위치는 국내선터미널 가까운편이지만 방 청소 및 배수시설..샤워기 수압등 모두좋지않다

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Чистый отель, современный ремонт, аэропорт рядом.
reviews.negatives: Началось все с того, что мы вызвали такси по названию отеля и приехали в другой отель. Администратор сказал, что такие случаи у них частые. Оказалось, что у отелей один владелец и одно название, но находятся они в разных местах. Мы потеряли время на дорогу, деньги на второе такси, чтобы добраться до нужного отеля. Сам отель новый, где-то идет ремонт. Отель рядом с оживленной улицей, где с утра очень шумно.

reviews.positives: Dobrá lokace nedaleko letiště, skvělé pro naši jednu noc před odletem. Personál na recepci velmi milý a ochotný.
reviews.negatives: Nelíbilo se nám jednání bosse hotelu. Měli jsme zabukované 3 pokoje cca 7 měsíců předem. Asi 3 hodiny před naším příjezdem jsme obdrželi zprávu, že se nám navyšuje cena cca o třetinu, což bylo značně nefér. Ačkoliv jsme nakonec vše domluvili k naší spokojenosti díky milým recepčním, zanechalo to v nás značné zklamání z jednání managmentu hotelu.

reviews.title: Stay at Hotel
reviews.positives: Spacious, near airport, staff friendly . Got minmart nearby.
reviews.negatives: Water heater barely hot, and was given the first floor. Best to include house keeping. Bed is hard. Can choose this for one night stay. Not recommended for few days stay.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Mình có đặt phòng trên app nhưng khi đến nhận thì nv có nói do hệ thống lỗi nên hết phòng và đổi mình sang chi nhánh khác. Mình đi công tác có nhu làm việc nên tin tưởng lựa chọn dịch vụ bên mình, đây là lần thứ 5 mình quay lại sd dịch vụ. Khi nv phản hồi mình oke đồng ý chuyển, nhưng khi nhận phòng bên chi nhánh khác mình thực sự rất sốc, chất lượng phòng quá tệ, phòng có mùi, chăn gối mùi tẩy quá nặng, rạng sáng cống wc có mùi bốc lên.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: This hotel will be perfectly located once T3 opens. It's a nice new building. Although it looks slightly unfinished still, it has a lot of potential.
reviews.negatives: We booked this room well in advance because of the holiday. We knew hotels near the airport would be all booked up with people with the same idea as us wanting to avoid traffic to the airport on reunification day. I didn't check my email until after work but saw the hotel had messaged to say they wouldn't hold the room after 5pm because they were so busy. Obviously this was very frustrating since this is exactly what reservations are for. I called and confirmed they had something still available for us. The room we got definitely felt like it was not one that's usually rented out. It had a window with no curtain pointing into the stairwell so was very bright all night, no toilet paper in the washroom, etc. On the plus side, since it kind of seemed like the floor was unfinished and no one else was staying on it, it was extremely quiet so we definitely got a good night's sleep aside from the bright light 🤣

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: khách sạn quá ổn, cách âm không tốt

reviews.title: close to airport uncomfortable beds
reviews.positives: I had to book a night at K&T hotel because the hotel I was scheduled to stay at there were road closures and wanted to stay close to the airport. So this hotel look like it's new, the staff friendly and close to airport
reviews.negatives: I didn't have a comfortable sleep, the beds were hard like rock.  K&T must consider attaching memory foam mattress on top of it.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Máy lạnh ở phòng có vấn đề, bị chảy nước, nhắn tin nhờ nhân viên lên kiểm tra và sửa chữa để tối về phòng ngủ, nhân viên oke mà tối về thì máy lạnh vẫn bị chảy nước, ko mát bằng nữa mặc dù để 16 độ, trải nghiệm lần này quá tệ

reviews.title: Job done.
reviews.positives: We stayed here for transit from the airport. This is a new hotel, and could do with some small improvements. However, the room did the job for one night. This hotel is not somewhere I would stay for a longer term stay. Our beds were incredibly uncomfortable, some may prefer a very hard bed, for me though, it was like sleeping on the floor. The pillow was terrible. We also had a big family on our floor occupying two rooms with children running up and down the outdoor metal stairs, up and down the corridor and both families shouting to each other from their rooms, we had to ask them to quieten down multiple times! So sound proofing is highly needed! There was also construction taking place until 3am, that restarted at 6/7am. Our night sleep wasn’t great quality, however the hotel served its purpose.
reviews.negatives: Sound proofing!!!!!

reviews.title: Chỗ có thể ngủ và nghỉ qua đêm
reviews.text: Khá sạch sẽ và ổn, mặc dù cách âm không tốt. Tuy nhiên, với nhu cầu lưu trú với mong muốn có chỗ tắm gội, ngủ nghỉ thì tại đây sẽ có thể đáp ứng nhu cầu đó trong cùng hạng phòng và giá cả, thì K&T này sạch sẽ và ổn áp hơn các khu vực mình đã từng ở quanh khu vực Phạm Văn Đồng.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: This is a nice comfortable hotel. But my one question is what factors justifies them charging over 1mil dong per night? They are not 3-4 stars hotel. Just a new budget hotel. My recent attemot to book saw thier price skyrocketed to 1.25mil even, 2.5mil dong per night. Its too ridiculous ans looks like pirates!
reviews.negatives: Stay is comfy but price does not justify

reviews.title: It’s fine for a day stay . Far from the city but very convenient to the airport .
reviews.positives: Changed to this hotel cos It’s near airport . Spent less travelling time compared to our 2nd hotel . Several minimarts around the area so for those who wants to have a late snack , it’s very much accessible. Room is clean but the floor is sticky . Better to put on slippers that they provided .
reviews.negatives: Room doesn’t have a proper window to view outside . Just a small window facing the emergency exit.

reviews.title: Good value for money but be careful if you like a soft mattress!
reviews.positives: We needed somewhere fairly close to the airport so this was perfect.  After we checked in we found some street food just down the road so we sat and ate and had a few beers which was really fun. There was also a convenience store within walking distance.  The room was a good size.
reviews.negatives: The mattresses were hard.  I slept ok but my other half amd son didn’t.

reviews.title: Excellent place to stay near the airport. Strongly recommend!
reviews.positives: We stayed there during our transit. The hotel is brand new, clean, quiet, super close to new terminal T3 and about 10-15mins drive to old terminals T1 and T2. Staffs are polite, friendly and helpful. Will definitely come back. Thank you.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
It's close to T3 domestic airport only 5' for taking a taxi. They sell a lot of breakfast in the morning near the hotel.

You should try the famous dumpling noodles restaurant near the hotel. Only 3' for walking and it's cheap. They sell in the evening and the morning. The name of the restaurant is Hy Ky Mi gia. After that you can take their dessert at the restaurant with cheese yougurt. It's yummy.
reviews.negatives: They will take the surcharge for paying credit card. It's better to pay cash.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 住宿位置便利，整潔度高且設施齊全，熱水充足，Wi-Fi穩定，衛浴設備讓人滿意。員工態度親切且專業，整體服務表現出色，提供良好住宿體驗，性價比也非常值得推薦。

reviews.title: 很棒

reviews.title: Great place and very helpful staff
reviews.text: Stayed for 1 day because I have a lay over in Ho Chi Minh. Has Netflix and super comfy place to stay at. I kinda wished I could stay longer. Will book again if I have connecting flight.
